user.title: RWS Webcam Selfie
user.description: Pick the device tracker that follows you (typically your phone or car) and tune the trigger radius. A recording will start whenever the tracker enters the radius of an enabled webcam, and stop when it leaves.

abort.single_instance_allowed: RWS Webcam Selfie is already configured.

start_recording.name: Start recording
start_recording.description: Manually start recording a specific RWS webcam.
